    Road Network Editor

    Navigation Mode
    Build Roads Mode
    Link Nodes Mode
    Right-click to set start/end points for routing. Build Mode: Click to add nodes. Right-click nodes to delete. Hold ctrl and click a line to add a node. Link Mode: Click two nodes to connect them.
